misc.text: 👇😊 Sercan Hamzaoğlu (@sercanhamzaolu) 🚨Fenerbahçe, Ollie Watkins transferinden vazgeçmiyor. İkili, Ollie Watkins transferi için oyuncu cephesi ve Aston Villa yetkilileriyle bir görüşme daha gerçekleştirecek. İsmail Kartal'ın transferini özellikle istediği Watkins için Fenerbahçe, son ana kadar tüm şartları zorlayacak. — https://nitter.net/sercanhamzaolu/status/2077029682210381965#m

misc.title: Today, famous mangaka Masanori Morita posted this: Yesterday, Oda-cchi treated me to a dreamlike dinner😍; something we’d been planning for about a year! Everything we ate was completely new to me, an
misc.text: Today, famous mangaka Masanori Morita posted this: Yesterday, Oda-cchi treated me to a dreamlike dinner😍; something we’d been planning for about a year! Everything we ate was completely new to me, and with my limited vocabulary, I’m frustrated that I can’t properly describe how it all tasted…! All I can say is that every single dish was absolutely incredible! Thank you so much!! Below are the intimidating-looking members of the group walking toward their taxis after dinner🔥: Masashi Kishimoto → Eiichiro Oda💡 → Hiroyuki Takei → Takehiko Inoue → Masakazu Katsura → Riichiro Inagaki → Gege Akutami → Kohei Horikoshi → Masanori Morita 森田まさのり (@HITMANmorita) 昨日一年前からの約束で、尾田っちに連れられて、夢のような食事をご馳走になりました！ 食べた事ないものばかりで、語彙の少ない僕には味が表現できないのが悔しい…！ただ全てめちゃくちゃ美味しかったです！ ありがとうございました〜っ!! 食事後、歩いてタクシーに向かういかついメンバーを。 — https://nitter.net/HITMANmorita/status/2076934892596916276#m

items.text: Today, famous mangaka Masanori Morita posted this: Yesterday, Oda-cchi treated me to a dreamlike dinner😍; something we’d been planning for about a year! Everything we ate was completely new to me, and with my limited vocabulary, I’m frustrated that I can’t properly describe how it all tasted…! All I can say is that every single dish was absolutely incredible! Thank you so much!! Below are the intimidating-looking members of the group walking toward their taxis after dinner🔥: Masashi Kishimoto → Eiichiro Oda💡 → Hiroyuki Takei → Takehiko Inoue → Masakazu Katsura → Riichiro Inagaki → Gege Akutami → Kohei Horikoshi → Masanori Morita 森田まさのり (@HITMANmorita) 昨日一年前からの約束で、尾田っちに連れられて、夢のような食事をご馳走になりました！ 食べた事ないものばかりで、語彙の少ない僕には味が表現できないのが悔しい…！ただ全てめちゃくちゃ美味しかったです！ ありがとうございました〜っ!! 食事後、歩いてタクシーに向かういかついメンバーを。 — https://nitter.net/HITMANmorita/status/2076934892596916276#m
